important_topics.line: The final exam is cumulative, but it focuses heavily on elasticity, welfare analysis, and homework-style calculation problems. Important topics include price elasticity of demand, consumer surplus, producer surplus, and deadweight loss.
important_topics.context: By the end of the course, students will be able to calculate price elasticity of demand, interpret total revenue changes, and explain consumer surplus. ## Exam Guidance The final exam is cumulative, but it focuses heavily on elasticity, welfare analysis, and homework-style calculation problems. Important topics include price elasticity of demand, consumer surplus, producer surplus, and deadweight loss.
